raw_block:
–1. Also called SHEVA, SHISHA, and SHAVSHA
  .David’ s scribe2Sa 8:17;20:25;1Ki 4:3;1Ch 18:16
–2. Chief priest at the time of collapse of Jerusalem2Ki 25:18
  .Father of EzraEzr 7:1
  .Killed by Nebuchadnezzar2Ki 25:18-21;Jer 52:24-27
–3. An Israelite captain who surrendered to Gedaliah2Ki 25:23;Jer 40:8
–4. Son of Kenaz1Ch 4:13,14
–5. A Simeonite1Ch 4:35
–6. A priest who returned from the Babylonian captivityEzr 2:2;Ne 12:1,12
  .Called AZARIAHNe 7:7
–7. One who sealed the covenant with NehemiahNe 10:2
  .Possibly identical with number six, see above
–8. A ruler of the temple after the captivityNe 11:11
–9. Son of Azriel
  .Commanded by King Jehoiakim to seize the prophet JeremiahJer 36:26
–10. A servant of ZedekiahJer 51:59,61
